title: Episode 1 — AI Benchmark Forecast
description: The Foundry council debates where the leading AI benchmarks land in April 2028. Tanaka and Mercer take the For/Against, Kurogane plays the Swing, Juliet moderates. Munk-Debates / Hitchens style.
summary: Where do the leading AI benchmarks land in April 2028? Tanaka, Kurogane, and Mercer debate; Juliet moderates.
